'''Overload''' is a Brazilian team.
== History ==
In March 2016, due to divergences with the [[Estúdio XP e-Sports]] organization, the roster led by [[Espeon]] left the organization, before [[BRCC 2016 Split 1 Playoffs]] finals, and formed '''Overload'''.
